principles: No full text, no article-level analysis.
Article claims are not facts until verified against primary or near-primary sources.
Only verified or partially verified claims may affect trend posteriors.
New evidence may weaken, split, retire, or replace existing hypotheses.

framework_update_policy.add_hypothesis_when: repeated verified evidence is not explained by current hypotheses
framework_update_policy.split_hypothesis_when: one hypothesis accumulates recurring conflicting verified evidence
framework_update_policy.retire_hypothesis_when: posterior remains weak and unsupported across multiple update cycles
